Defines JSON built-in object and routines for parsing and stringifying in JerryScript.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines macros and routines related to JSON operations within a JavaScript engine. It specifies the built-in JSON object identifier using the `OBJECT_ID` macro and defines two main JSON routines: `parse` and `stringify`. The `ROUTINE` macro is used to associate the property names `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_PARSE` and `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_STRINGIFY` with their corresponding C function implementations, `ecma_builtin_json_parse` and `ecma_builtin_json_stringify`, along with their argument counts and length property values. The file uses conditional compilation to ensure that the macros are defined only if they are not already defined, and it concludes by undefining these macros to prevent conflicts in other parts of the code.
